name: daily
description: Date-organized daily notes via Obsidian's core Daily Notes plugin + Calendar; ports accuris's Timestamps pattern under spice/daily/. v0.1.4: contributes Today nav-button (invoke_command -> daily-notes; the core daily-notes plugin's 'Open today's daily note' command id) requiring nav-buttons >=2.3.0; filename pattern dddd-YYYY-MM-DD per v0.4.2 platform invariant. v0.2.0: SpaceDailyDashboard panels (tasks + meetings) migrated to BeaconCards via panel-host wrapper preserved + per-panel dv shim ({container: subContainerEl}); tasks panel rendered ABOVE meetings panel (S2 user feedback); tasks use synthetic-page pattern with onClick to parent file. v0.2.2: adds autorun:true on app start + Cmd+[ binding for the daily-notes command (consumes new hotkeys[] manifest field shipped with convenience@0.1.0 mechanism in v0.21.1). v0.2.5 PATCH: ships hidden <!-- COWORK_CALLOUTS --> anchor above ## Notes for cowork@0.1.0 callout insertion. v0.2.6 PATCH (v0.31.0 S6.6 — daily dashboard polish): SpaceDailyDashboard meeting filter widened startsWith(today) → includes(today) so trailing-date naming Foo-2026-05-12.md is matched (accuris convention); dashboard container gains box-sizing/width/max-width/overflow-x: hidden so narrow viewports no longer scroll horizontally; task list items gain word-break + overflow-wrap so long no-space task strings wrap. v0.3.0 MINOR (v0.33.0 wave 2): adopts claude_surface[] — ships canonical /daily slash command + open-today SKILL.md + resolvers row. v0.5.0 MINOR (v0.64.0): reclaims canonical ownership of ranch/templates/Daily Note.md (cowork@0.9.1 dropped its competing copy). daily-template.md absorbs Templater preamble + cowork-flavor frontmatter (type/day/day_label/created_at/tags) + H1 + COWORK_CALLOUTS marker. SpaceDailyDashboard grows third 'Today's Activity' panel that delegates to customJS.ActivityFeed.render with new asOf + includeMtime opts (anchors time window to the daily note's date; catches edited-not-just-created notes via file.mtime). Activity panel excludes daily/cowork-daily/cowork-weekly/cowork-monthly types to avoid self-reference. Existing tasks + meetings panels unchanged. v0.5.1 PATCH (v0.64.1): three fixes from headspace smoke. (1) BUGFIX SpaceDailyDashboard activity-panel shim now delegates `.pages` to the real dv — v0.5.0 shim only had `.container`, so ActivityFeed._query's `dv.pages()` call failed with 'dv.pages is not a function' and the panel never rendered. (2) Tasks panel: render markdown links `[text](url)` + wikilinks `[[target]]` (and `[[target|alias]]`) as clickable HTML anchors via new `_renderTaskHTML(text)` helper; LI click still opens parent daily note for clicks outside any anchor; wikilink anchors wire onclick → app.workspace.openLinkText. (3) COWORK_CALLOUTS anchor switched from HTML-comment `<!-- COWORK_CALLOUTS -->` to Obsidian `%% COWORK_CALLOUTS %%` syntax — invisible in BOTH source AND reading mode (HTML comments are only invisible in reading mode). Cowork orchestrator skills + content files + manifest descriptions updated in lockstep (cowork@0.9.1 → 0.9.2 PATCH).

post_install.message: Daily blueprint installed at spice/daily/. REQUIRED: enable the core Daily Notes plugin (Settings → Core plugins → Daily notes) AND optionally the Calendar community plugin (Settings → Community plugins → Browse → Calendar). Run command 'Daily notes: Open today's daily note' (or click a date in Calendar) to create your first daily note.
